metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin bundles — infrastructure, business, content, medical, dev-tools, and harness maintenance

plugins.name: infra
plugins.description: Infrastructure management — Hetzner Cloud, UniFi, home network, VMs, document archives, and deployment principles

plugins.name: business
plugins.description: Business operations — proposals, invoicing, accounting, Amazon orders, 1Password credentials, email automation

plugins.name: content
plugins.description: Content creation and social — LinkedIn automation, brand profiles, Pencil UI design, audio transcription

plugins.name: medical
plugins.description: Healthcare and FHIR — Mira Aidbox config, billing review, compliance auditing, clinical UX human-factors review

plugins.name: dev-tools
plugins.description: Development tooling — playwright-cli, bug-triage, codex, project-health, project-setup, spec-developer, test agents

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: Harness authoring and audit — agent/hook/skill/plugin creation, entropy scan, NBJ audit, system prompt audit, token cost, CLAUDE.md pruning, standards sync

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Essential skills for every session — beads, dolt, standards, cmux, prompt-refiner, summarize, vision, event-log

plugins.name: beads-workflow
plugins.description: Beads orchestration and lifecycle — wave-orchestrator, epic-init, retro, compound, bead-metrics, workplan, intake
